logs.message: Package 'Moq' 4.20.0 has a known low severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6r78-m64m-qwcf

Package 'ncalc 1.3.8' was restored using '.NETFramework,Version=v4.6.1, .NETFramework,Version=v4.6.2, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7.1, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7.2, .NETFramework,Version=v4.8, .NETFramework,Version=v4.8.1' instead of the project target framework 'net10.0'. This package may not be fully compatible with your project.
